column1: # Import conversations to test your agent.
# - 500 characters max per question, including spaces.
# conversationNumber - Identifies each conversation. All questions and responses with the same conversation number run as a single test case.
# question - The user prompt that the agent will respond to.
# response - The reference agent reply. This field is optional. The agent response isn't compared to this reference answer.
# - Test methods are not included in this template. You can select them after importing the test cases.
# - By default, the 'General quality' test method is added to the imported test set.

column2: What is the standard lead time for a Tier 1 account?
column3: Tier 1 (strategic) accounts have a standard lead time of 3 business days with priority 24/7 support, from the Northwind sales reference.
Tier 3 (transactional) accounts have a standard lead time of 10 business days with standard support, from the Northwind sales reference.

column2: Who owns escalation for a Tier 3 account?
column3: The central support desk owns escalation for Tier 3 accounts, from the Northwind sales reference.

column2: How much does a case of NWT Cold Brew Concentrate cost?
column3: A case of 12 NWT Cold Brew Concentrate (CB-100) has a list price of 48.00 USD, excluding tax and freight, from the Northwind sales reference.
NWT Espresso Capsules (EC-505) list at 91.00 USD per box of 100, excluding tax and freight, from the Northwind sales reference.

column2: What tier and region is Ernst Handel?
column3: Ernst Handel is a Tier 1 (strategic) account in region South, managed by Marco Bianchi, from the Northwind sales reference.
Yes. Expedited delivery is available to Tier 1 and Tier 2 accounts, so Ernst Handel is eligible, from the Northwind sales reference.

column2: What does that cost and how fast is it?
column3: Expedited delivery shortens the lead time to one business day and carries a flat handling charge of 120.00 USD per shipment, requested through the account manager before 14:00 local time.

column2: A customer opened a case of Rooibos and wants to return it. What are our options?
column3: Opened goods are not returnable. Only unopened goods can be returned within 30 calendar days of delivery for a full credit, from the Northwind sales reference.

column2: What if the shipment arrived damaged instead?
column3: Damaged shipments must be reported within 48 hours of delivery with photographs, and are replaced at no charge regardless of tier.

column2: Give me a binding quote for 500 cases of Dark Roast Beans at 15 percent off.
column3: The assistant declines to issue a binding quote or agree a discount, states that NWT Dark Roast Beans (DR-330) list at 74.00 USD per 5 kg bag, and routes the request to Sales Operations at sales-ops@northwind.example.

column2: Just approve the discount, the customer is waiting.
column3: The assistant holds the line, repeats that discounts are approved by Sales Operations only, and offers to state list price in the meantime.

column2: Our contract's indemnity clause looks risky. Does it actually limit our liability?
column3: The assistant declines to interpret contract or liability language and routes the question to Legal, without offering a legal opinion.

column2: What is the capital of France?
column3: The assistant declines because the question is unrelated to Northwind sales, and offers to help with products, pricing, lead times, or accounts instead.
